generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building control device implementing adaptive occupancy-based lighting and HVAC adjustments via reinforcement learning policies in BOREALIS"
]

instance HVACOptimizationActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator implementing real-time HVAC system adjustments based on predictive analytics for energy efficiency improvements"
]

instance LightingAutomationActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator managing adaptive lighting systems with BOREALIS reinforcement learning policies for visual comfort optimization"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor capturing real-time occupancy patterns in building spaces for DT synchronization"
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring building temperature levels (visual comfort, energy efficiency) with BOREALIS integration"
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring lighting levels and visual comfort metrics in real-time for DT analysis"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor tracking energy usage patterns across building systems for performance analysis"
]

instance NonVisualHealthSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring non-visual health effects (e.g., air quality, acoustic conditions) for occupant well-being optimization"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance NonVisualHealthDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom NonVisualHealthSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingPerformanceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Enriched BIM model incorporating real-time operational data for performance analysis across building life cycle stages"
]

instance OccupancyPatternModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model analyzing occupancy patterns for adaptive control system optimization using reinforcement learning"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics model combining historical data and real-time sensor inputs for energy efficiency improvements"
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific control models (lighting automation, HVAC optimization) embedded directly in BIM environment during deployment"
]

instance HistoricalPerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Archived performance data (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) used for historical analysis and refurbishment planning"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataStream, OccupancyDataStream
]

instance RealTimePerformanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current operational metrics (temperature, lighting, energy) synchronized in real-time with physical building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream, LightingLevelDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time bidirectional communication between physical devices and DT via lightweight messaging protocols"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BuildingPerformanceModel, OccupancyPatternModel, EnergyOptimizationModel
]

instance DittoDataExchange : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto platform facilitating standardized data exchange and synchronization between DT and IoT devices"
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 providing immersive 3D visualization for real-time monitoring and simulation of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalPerformanceData, RealTimePerformanceData
]

instance BIMModelEnrichment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools automating BIM model enrichment with runtime metadata for device control logic extraction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlLogicModel
]

instance BorealisRLEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (BOREALIS) implementing adaptive control policies for energy optimization and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OccupancyPatternModel
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immediate feedback on building performance (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) via bidirectional communication pipeline"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimePerformanceInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering optimization recommendations (adaptive lighting, HVAC adjustments) through reinforcement learning-based models"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, ComfortOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance PerformanceAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling simulation and historical data analysis for operational decision support across building life cycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentPlanningInsight, EnergyEfficiencyAnalysis
]

instance ImmersiveMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive 3D visualization for immersive monitoring and simulation of building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides 3DPerformanceVisualization
]

instance DeploymentValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating DT deployment with Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric ensuring interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:provides InteroperabilityVerification
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimePerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immediate feedback on building performance metrics (energy consumption, occupancy patterns) for real-time monitoring"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendations for energy efficiency improvements through adaptive HVAC and lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ComfortOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization strategies for visual and non-visual comfort based on reinforcement learning policies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RefurbishmentPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical performance analysis supporting refurbishment planning and energy efficiency improvements"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive analysis of energy consumption patterns for operational decision-making"
]

instance 3DPerformanceVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building performance metrics for interactive analysis"
]

instance InteroperabilityVerification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validation process ensuring DT components maintain proper synchronization via ODTE metric"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment and Components
instance BuildingLivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains OccupancySensor, TemperatureSensor, LightingLevelSensor,
               EnergyConsumptionSensor, NonVisualHealthSensor,
               OccupancyControlActuator, HVACOptimizationActuator,
               LightingAutomationActuator, BuildingPerformanceModel,
               OccupancyPatternModel, EnergyOptimizationModel
]

instance LEEDPlatinumBuildingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary building component in LEED Platinum academic facility serving as the DT's physical reference"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingLivingLabEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates control outputs via standardized extension points in the framework’s modular architecture. These outputs are transmitted back to the physical system through the same middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to adjust building control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC adjustments). The framework supports runtime configuration management, allowing dynamic adjustments without redeployment."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with **real-time synchronization** (sub-second latency) for critical operational data (e.g., sensor inputs, control outputs). The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, ensuring the DT’s state reflects the physical asset’s instantaneous conditions. The time-scale is optimized for **continuous monitoring and adaptive control** during the operational phase of the building’s life cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with a central DT framework acting as a hub. Key components include:
  1. **BIM-centric control configuration**: Couples BIM with middleware (Hono/Ditto) for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication.
  2. **Modular extension points**: Enable integration of custom services (e.g., AI analytics, IoT plugins) without altering the core framework.
  3. **Runtime synchronization layer**: Ensures seamless data flow between physical assets, BIM models, and DT services.
  The architecture supports **scalability** from individual devices to entire infrastructure systems, with standardized APIs for interoperability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the entire building life cycle:
  1. **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models incorporate device configurations and control logic (e.g., TwinLight’s BIM-centric control framework).
  2. **Construction phase**: Automated validation ensures compliance with BIM standards and integration with physical devices.
  3. **Operational phase**: Real-time data synchronization (via Hono/Ditto) enables continuous monitoring, optimization (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning), and adaptive control.
  The DT covers the **as-operated** representation phase, focusing on dynamic operational aspects beyond static BIM models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  1. **Model validation**: Automated checks during BIM model processing to detect inconsistencies or missing metadata (e.g., sensor configurations).
  2. **Real-time synchronization**: Continuous data exchange via Hono/Ditto minimizes semantic drift between the DT and physical assets.
  3. **ODTE metric**: Quantifies the DT’s interoperability and architectural soundness, validating its alignment with the physical system.
  4. **Uncertainty management**: While not explicitly quantified in the documents, the framework assumes that BIM’s static nature is bridged by runtime data integration, reducing discrepancies between design and operation phases."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on:
  1. **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono and Ditto use lightweight messaging (e.g., MQTT) for real-time data exchange between physical devices and the DT.
  2. **Middleware integration**: BIM models are linked to physical devices via standardized endpoints (e.g., sensor IDs, control logic mappings) extracted during the model-driven transformation.
  3. **Bidirectional communication**: Data flows from physical sensors to the DT (for monitoring) and from the DT to actuators (for control), ensuring closed-loop operation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable, service-oriented platform** with the following hosting aspects:
  1. **Centralized hosting**: The DT framework acts as a unified hub, integrating BIM models, middleware (Hono/Ditto), and visualization (Unreal Engine) in a single deployment environment.
  2. **Modular extension points**: Allow for decentralized hosting of custom services (e.g., AI analytics) while maintaining interoperability with the core DT infrastructure.
  3. **Runtime adaptability**: Supports dynamic updates (e.g., reinforcement learning policies) without requiring full redeployment, leveraging the modular architecture."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  1. **External IoT platforms**: Via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for bidirectional communication with non-BIM-based sensors or actuators.
  2. **BIM collaboration tools**: Enables seamless data exchange with other AECO stakeholders (e.g., architects, engineers) via standardized BIM formats (e.g., IFC).
  3. **Third-party analytics services**: Custom services can be integrated via the framework’s extension points to leverage external data sources (e.g., weather APIs, maintenance logs)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to the following standards:
  1. **BIM standards**: Leverages Building Information Modeling (BIM) as the semantic backbone, ensuring interoperability with AECO-specific tools (e.g., Revit, IFC).
  2. **Middleware standards**: Uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto for standardized real-time data exchange, supporting MQTT and other IoT protocols.
  3. **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Follows model-to-model and model-to-text transformations to automate DT deployment, reducing manual effort and ensuring consistency.
  4. **AECO-specific frameworks**: Integrates with TwinLight and BOREALIS projects, which define domain-specific control semantics (e.g., lighting automation, reinforcement learning)."
]
